MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hannah Salassi for Lawrence Christiansen (Executor).

Ms. Salassi stated that filing of the notice of hearing was accomplished, that verification of the status report was sent to her Client for signature, that her Client stated that he did not receive it and that she can take care of all of the issues by the end of next week. The Court informed Ms. Salassi that no courtesy copies of the petition and the proposed order was provided. Report on Status of Administration, etc. is continued to February 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Barrientos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Continued To Dec-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kendall Fletcher for petitioner Lawrence Christiansen.

Ms. Fletcher reported that the estate was not in condition to be closed, as it did not have funds to pay statutory fees. She stated that it did hold property in Calaveras County, but that the occupants of the property had to be evicted before the property could be sold. The Court directed that a report on the status be filed and set for hearing. The matter was continued to December 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 for a further status hearing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kendal Fletcher on behalf of Milla Lvovich for (executor) Lawrence Christiansen.

Ms. Kendal reported that her firm substituted in in July, that they do not have the file yet, that previous counsel had health issues and has been on vacation, that they have been unable to get responses to the probate examiner's questions from previous counsel, would like to withdraw the petition as the estate is not ready to close, that they have found there are unpaid parcel taxes, that there is not enough money in the estate to pay the taxes or statutory fees to the administrator or counsel, that the beneficiary is on board with selling a property, that they need to file a UD case in Calaveras County to evict the tenant to be able to sell the property/land and request 4 months to close the estate. Status on close of the estate is set for December 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting petition was taken off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Gilbert for and with Anthony Ricci (Petitioner). Dennis Livingston for and with Lawrence Christiansen (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to why their Client should be appointed, spoke of the condition of the properties (San Francisco/Calaveras), whether the properties were insured, etc. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary appointing Lawrence Christiansen as Executor (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. The will is admitted to probate. Mr. Ricci's Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was denied.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
